word: G3175 - μεγιστᾶνες - megistânes - meg-is-tan'-es - Great men

sections.paragraph:
- Original: μεγιστᾶνες

- Transliteration: megistanes

- Phonetic: meg-is-tan'-es

- Definition:

1. the grandees, magnates, nobles, chief men

a. of a city or a people

b. of the associates or courtiers of a king

- Origin: plural from G3176

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: Plural from G3176; grandees: - great men lords.
